name: Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Sift together flour, baking powder, spices, and salt in a bowl.
3. In another bowl, beat oil, sugar, and eggs at medium speed for one minute.
4. Add bananas to the egg mixture and mix until well combined.
5. Gradually add the flour mixture to the banana mixture, stirring only until blended.
6. Pour batter into a greased loaf pan.
7. Bake for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
